question.content: For the same cycle with compressor and expander efficiencies both equal to 0.85, compute expander theoretical specific work for no-regeneration and regeneration cases. Output exactly two decimal numbers separated by one comma as no_regen,regen, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Apply efficiency-adjusted expansion states for both configurations.
step_1.key_point: Efficiency-adjusted expansion states for both configurations.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 2 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up relation for expander specific work in no-regen and regen cases.

step_5.content: Compute and output the two expander specific-work values.
step_5.key_point: Compute expander work for no-regen and regen.
